features: Simple Kind to Skin Regime Gift Set includes three beauty products enriched with Pro-Vitamins B5 and E
Simple Kind to Skin Moisturising Facial Wash 150 ml removes every last trace of makeup, dirt and grime without that tight, dry skin feeling
Simple Kind to Skin Rich Moisture Sheet Mask boosts the skin’s moisture in just 15 minutes for naturally healthy-looking skin
Simple Kind to Skin Hydrating Light Moisturiser 125 ml keeps the skin feeling soft, smooth and hydrated for up to 12 hours
Simple face cleansers and moisturisers contain no artificial perfume, colour or harsh chemicals that can upset the skin
Packaged in a ready-to-give box, this gift set is perfect for any occasion, for nieces, daughters and friends who enjoy a bit of pampering
description: Product Description Know someone who is totally and utterly into taking care of their skin in the kindest way possible? Show just how much you care by treating them to an at-home pampering session with the Simple Kind to Skin Regime Gift Set. Right from the get-go, the Simple philosophy has always been about being kind to skin, even the most sensitive. Because all skin can be sensitive at times. That’s why this gift set comes with three Simple products that are kind and suitable for all skin types. Powered by Pro Amino Acid Technology, Simple Kind to Skin Moisturising Facial Wash gently washes away makeup and impurities and helps boost skin resilience to reveal smooth and healthy-looking skin. Our Kind to Skin Rich Moisture Sheet Mask contours her face like a second skin as it relieves dryness and provides lasting nourishment. Simple Kind to Skin Hydrating Light Moisturiser hydrates instantly and delivers up to 12 hours of moisturisation for a healthy skin barrier and softer, smoother skin. Packaged and ready to give in a box, these beauty products are infused with skin-loving ingredients such as Pro-Vitamins B5 and E, containing no artificial perfume, colour or harsh chemicals that can upset the skin. Ingredients Simple KTS Moisturising Face Wash 150ml Ingredients: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Decyl Glucoside, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycerin, PEG-55 Propylene Glycol Oleate, Propylene Glycol, Sodium Chloride, Panthenol, PEG-7 Glyceryl Cocoate, Phenoxyethanol, Glycol Distearate, Tocopheryl Acetate, Polyquaternium-39, Cocamide MEA, Laureth-10, Disodium EDTA, Sodium Benzoate, Hydroxypropyl Cyclodextrin, Pantolactone, Benzoic Acid, Bisabolol, Iodopropynyl Butylcarbamate, Citric Acid. Simple Rich Moisture Sheet Mask 1PC Ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, Panthenol, Tocopheryl Acetate, Niacinamide, Propanediol, Persea Gratissima Oil, 1,2-Hexanediol, Hydroxyacetophenone, Dehydroxanthan Gum, Inulin, Caprylhydroxamic Acid, Agave Tequilana Leaf Extract, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Citric Acid, Rosa Centifolia Flower Extract. Hydrating Light Moisturiser 125ml Ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, Paraffinum Liquidum, Polyglyceryl-3 Methylglucose Distearate, Niacinamide, Dimethicone, Cetyl Palmitate, Cetyl Alcohol, Panthenol, Caprylyl Glycol, Carbomer, Phenoxyethanol, Potassium Hydroxide, Tocopheryl Acetate, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Disodium EDTA, Pantolactone, Borago Officinalis Seed Oil, Stearic Acid, Potassium Carbonate, Bisabolol, Citric Acid, Pentylene Glycol, Urea, Lactic Acid, Sodium Lactate, Serine, Sorbitol, Sodium Chloride, Allantoin. Directions 1. Simple Kind to Skin Moisturising Facial Wash: Wet your face and work the cleanser into a lather. Gently massage it onto your face and rinse thoroughly. 2. Simple Kind to Skin Rich Moisture Sheet Mask: Cleanse your face, then open the sheet mask packet and remove the mask. Place the mask on your face, aligning the holes with your eyes, nose, and mouth. Wear the mask for 15 minutes, then remove and discard it. Gently pat the remaining essence into your skin. 3. Simple Kind to Skin Hydrating Light Moisturiser: Apply a small amount of moisturiser to your fingertips and gently massage it onto your face and neck, avoiding the eye area. Use it twice daily, in the morning and at night. See more
